remaining_1_skip.pattern: describe.skipIf(REAL_PG_URL)(...) — registers describe regardless of env, vitest counts child as skipped when env set
remaining_1_skip.why_cannot_reach_100pct_total: Pattern differs from pass8 which uses `if(!hasRealPg){describe(...)}` (conditional register, vanishes when env set). Frozen OLD test author chose describe.skipIf form for this file. Fixing requires modifying OLD frozen test source.
remaining_1_skip.decision: Accept as architectural — 1 placeholder skip is no-op, zero impact on suite health
